About Me

Data Analyst Across Three Domains

I'm a Senior Data Analyst with 5+ years delivering end-to-end analytics and BI solutions. My expertise covers risk adjustment, Medicare/Medicaid/ACA claims, banking transaction reporting, and enterprise KPI dashboards always tied to executive decision-making and compliance standards.

I specialize in advanced SQL development, Power BI & Tableau dashboard engineering with DAX, scalable ETL pipeline design on GCP and Azure, and Python-driven statistical analysis delivering actionable insight from complex data at enterprise scale.
